name: subroutine
description: Ambient implementation discipline for TypeScript monorepos — a PostToolUse/SubagentStart/SessionStart hook deterministically injects type-safety, Result/unwrap, Zod validation, code-organisation, React, and Hono-pipeline rules whenever a matching file is edited or reviewed. The SKILL.md files hold the rules; the hook delivers them, so the discipline rides along even when model-driven skill invocation wouldn't. No workflows, no commands. Defers to the repo's own AGENTS.md. Cross-runtime (Claude Code + Codex).
